body_errors.note: transcript has ποιήσει but page reads ποιήσει.
transcript has συναπολῇ but page reads συναπολῇ.
verse 16 first line should be ποιήσῃς? actually page reads ποιήσῃς; no error except duplicate lines below
verse 16 lines 'ὅτι ... καταβαλεῖ σε' are duplicated in transcript; duplicated occurrence counts as erroneous extra word(s) but counted here as one representative wrong word

apparatus_errors.note: transcript uses Latin N where page has Greek uncial ℵ in 'ανθρακας ℵ*'

note: Body is mostly accurate but contains a clear duplicated two-line clause in v.16; apparatus is largely good with a minor siglum transcription issue.
